# Move 1: Map the Territory

**Target:** {{C_SUITE_ROLE}}, {{SEGMENT}}
**Date:** {{DATE}}
**Time to complete:** ~{{TIME}} minutes agent execution (framework target: 2-4 hours human)

---

## Input

C-suite proxy: **{{C_SUITE_ROLE}}**, {{SEGMENT_DESCRIPTION}}.

{{SCOPING_RATIONALE — Why this segment? What makes the role's accountability broader or narrower here?}}

---

## Method

1. Defined core functional jobs via web research across four source categories: APQC PCF, Big 4 frameworks, professional association standards, and segment-specific research.
2. Validated each job against three tests (universality, mutual exclusivity, data support) per `odi-job-validation.md`.
3. Defined cross-cutting domains via the same four source categories.
4. Validated each domain against the same three tests.
5. Built territory matrix at the intersection only after both validations passed.

---

## Core Functional Jobs ({{N_JOBS}})

These are the stable, ongoing responsibilities that define the {{C_SUITE_ROLE}} role. Each passes the test: "If this job disappeared, the role would be fundamentally different."

| # | Job | Definition | Key Sources |
|---|-----|-----------|-------------|
| **C1** | {{JOB_1_NAME}} | {{JOB_1_DEFINITION}} | {{JOB_1_SOURCES}} |
| **C2** | {{JOB_2_NAME}} | {{JOB_2_DEFINITION}} | {{JOB_2_SOURCES}} |
| **C3** | {{JOB_3_NAME}} | {{JOB_3_DEFINITION}} | {{JOB_3_SOURCES}} |
| ... | ... | ... | ... |

### Core Job Statements

Each job framed per `odi-core-job-statements.md` — goal language, solution-free, stable 10+ years:

| # | Core Job Statement |
|---|-------------------|
| **C1** | When [context], [goal verb] [object] [clarifying phrase]. |
| **C2** | When [context], [goal verb] [object] [clarifying phrase]. |
| ... | ... |

### Segment Distinction

| Job | Enterprise {{C_SUITE_ROLE}} | {{SEGMENT}} {{C_SUITE_ROLE}} |
|-----|---------------------------|------------------------------|
| C1 | {{HOW_ENTERPRISE_HANDLES_C1}} | {{HOW_SEGMENT_HANDLES_C1}} |
| C2 | {{HOW_ENTERPRISE_HANDLES_C2}} | {{HOW_SEGMENT_HANDLES_C2}} |
| ... | ... | ... |

## Job Validation

Per `odi-job-validation.md`, every core job must pass three tests before proceeding.

### Three-Test Results

| # | Job | Universality | Mutual Exclusivity | Data Support | Pass? |
|---|-----|:-----------:|:------------------:|:------------:|:-----:|
| **C1** | {{JOB_1}} | {{PASS/FAIL — rationale}} | {{PASS/FAIL — rationale}} | {{PASS/FAIL — APQC L2 + 3 sources}} | {{YES/NO}} |
| **C2** | {{JOB_2}} | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{YES/NO}} |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

### Boundary Rules

Per `odi-core-job-statements.md`, each core job requires explicit boundary rules:

| # | Job | Owns | Does Not Own | Boundary Test |
|---|-----|------|-------------|---------------|
| **C1** | {{JOB_1}} | {{WHAT_THIS_JOB_OWNS}} | {{ADJACENT_JOBS_THAT_OWN_THIS}} | {{SINGLE_SENTENCE_HEURISTIC}} |
| **C2** | {{JOB_2}} | {{OWNS}} | {{DOES_NOT_OWN}} | {{HEURISTIC}} |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

### Jobs Considered and Excluded

| Candidate Job | Test Failed | Resolution |
|--------------|-------------|------------|
| {{CANDIDATE_1}} | {{WHICH_TEST_FAILED}} | {{MERGED_INTO/DEMOTED_TO/EXCLUDED — rationale}} |
| {{CANDIDATE_2}} | {{TEST}} | {{RESOLUTION}} |
| ... | ... | ... |

## Domains ({{N_DOMAINS}})

These are the knowledge/regulatory/process areas that cut across the {{C_SUITE_ROLE}}'s jobs. Each domain creates a substantively different work context.

| # | Domain | Definition | Key Sources |
|---|--------|-----------|-------------|
| **D1** | {{DOMAIN_1_NAME}} | {{DOMAIN_1_DEFINITION}} | {{DOMAIN_1_SOURCES}} |

| **D3** | {{DOMAIN_3_NAME}} | {{DOMAIN_3_DEFINITION}} | {{DOMAIN_3_SOURCES}} |
| ... | ... | ... | ... |

{{DOMAIN_SELECTION_CRITERIA — e.g., separate credential track, standalone APQC group, separate practice line at 2+ Big 4 firms, substantively different work context.}}

## Territory Matrix

{{N_JOBS}} Jobs x {{N_DOMAINS}} Domains = **{{N_TERRITORIES}} territories**

|  | D1: {{DOMAIN_1}} | D2: {{DOMAIN_2}} | D3: {{DOMAIN_3}} | ... |
|--|---|---|---|---|
| **C1: {{JOB_1}}** | {{C1xD1_DESCRIPTION}} | {{C1xD2_DESCRIPTION}} | {{C1xD3_DESCRIPTION}} | ... |
| **C2: {{JOB_2}}** | {{C2xD1_DESCRIPTION}} | {{C2xD2_DESCRIPTION}} | {{C2xD3_DESCRIPTION}} | ... |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

### Blurred Boundary Intersections (High-Priority)

Per `odi-job-map-structure.md`, flag intersections where two core jobs share a boundary that blurs at the executor level:

| Intersection | Jobs Involved | Why Blurred | Priority |
|-------------|--------------|-------------|----------|
| {{TERRITORY}} | {{JOB_A}} x {{JOB_B}} | {{EXECUTOR_EXPERIENCES_BOTH_SIMULTANEOUSLY}} | **High** |
| ... | ... | ... | ... |

---

## Output

**Territory matrix: {{N_JOBS}} jobs x {{N_DOMAINS}} domains = {{N_TERRITORIES}} territories.**

All jobs and domains validated against three tests (universality, mutual exclusivity, data support). Boundary rules documented per job. Excluded candidates documented with failure reason and resolution.

This is the map for Move 2 screening. Not every cell will be deeply scored — the next move identifies which territories are structurally exposed to disruption (hot territories) and which are protected.

---

## Self-Validation Results

Per `rules/recursive-validation.md`, Move 1 checklist:

| # | Criterion | Status | Note |
|---|-----------|:------:|------|
| 1.1 | Every core job passes universality test | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.2 | Every core job passes mutual exclusivity test | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.3 | Every core job passes data support test | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.4 | Candidate set passes ends-vs-means test | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.5 | Core job statements: no "while"/"and" | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.6 | Goal framing used (not responsibility framing) | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.7 | Boundary rules documented per job | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.8 | Every domain passes all three tests | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.9 | Domain sources: 3+ per domain | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.10 | Excluded candidates documented | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |
| 1.11 | Blurred boundaries flagged | {{PASS/FAIL}} | {{NOTE}} |

**Iterations:** {{N}}
**Final status:** {{ALL PASS / N unresolvable issues}}

## JSON Output

Write `move1_output.json` per the Move 1 schema in `rules/json-handoff-schema.md`. Include all validated jobs (with id, name, statement, boundary_test), all validated domains (with id, name, definition), territory_count, and blurred_boundaries.
